fixture: 028_drop_recreate_insert

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE logs (id INTEGER NOT NULL, code INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO logs VALUES (1, 11)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    DROP TABLE logs
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 4:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE logs (id INTEGER NOT NULL, code INTEGER NOT NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 5:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO logs VALUES (2, 22)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1
